payment_plans.name: Construction Linked Plan (CLP)
payment_plans.description: Pay in installments linked to construction milestones — 10% booking, 85% during construction, 5% on possession.

payment_plans.name: Down Payment Plan
payment_plans.description: Pay 50% upfront and get 3% discount on base price. Remaining 50% on possession.

payment_plans.name: Flexi EMI Plan
payment_plans.description: Pay only interest during construction. Full EMI starts after possession. Available with all major banks.
